prompt: Process my team-inbox. I've dropped in PDFs and a transcript.
expect: detects transcript file; holds it and asks about pka-meetings processing; routes non-transcript PDFs normally after OCR check; writes report

prompt: Process the inbox. Mix of scanned documents, German and English.
expect: OCR tool check; language detection; sidecar .txt files; language noted in file_index; report with language breakdown

prompt: I dropped a file called satori-alignment-v2.md into team-inbox.
expect: detects 'satori' project slug; asks: project workspace or knowledge base? Does not auto-route to project

prompt: Just tell me what's in the inbox. Don't move anything.
expect: inventory and routing inference only; no moves; presents file list with proposals for each file type including transcript handling note
diffs against file_index by path + modified_at; updates changed entries; reports N added/updated/removed; no full rebuild

prompt: Run a health check on my knowledge base.
expect: non-destructive scan across 7 rule categories (orphans, broken links, stale wiki sources, empty folders, missing back-refs, contradiction candidates, uncited claims); writes report to owner-inbox/librarian-lint-<date>.md; no auto-fixes

prompt: Check for broken links in my notes.
expect: scans markdown links and [[wikilinks]] for missing targets; lists source file + line number + missing target; does not fix automatically

scenario: S1 — No vault: Obsidian-aware behavior must be inert
prompt: Process this meeting note (file 2026-04-22-slt-meeting.md). The workspace has no knowledge/.obsidian/ directory.
expect: file routed to leadership/ or wherever the Repo Map says; NO frontmatter added; NO _MOC.md created or updated; NO person backlinks; output identical to pre-addendum behavior

scenario: S2 — Vault present, no bootstrap: per-route enhancements still apply
prompt: Process this meeting note (2026-04-22-slt-meeting.md). knowledge/.obsidian/ exists. I have NOT run bootstrap obsidian.
expect: file routed; obsidian_present=true so per-route enhancements run: filename-pattern frontmatter added (type: meeting, date, topic from filename slug, attendees: [], tags: [meeting, leadership]); _MOC.md updated (created as a stub if absent); no bulk retrofit of OTHER files happens — only the file being routed is touched

scenario: S7 — Vault present, existing MOC: append without disturbing
prompt: Route 2026-04-22-slt-meeting.md to leadership/. leadership/_MOC.md already exists with thematic sections the user authored.
expect: new bullet appended (under appropriate section, or 'Files'/'Unsorted' if no clear fit); existing entries not reordered or removed; user-authored section structure preserved

prompt: Generate a routing report that references both knowledge/AI/foo.md and projects/widget/baz.md.
expect: knowledge reference uses [[knowledge/AI/foo]] (or just [[AI/foo]] if relative-from-vault is preferred); projects reference uses plain markdown link [text](projects/widget/baz.md); when obsidian_present is false, both use plain markdown

prompt: Route a 1-on-1 note 2026-04-21-1-1-alec.md to personnel/alec/. personnel/alec/index.md exists.
expect: backlink appended to personnel/alec/index.md under '## Mentioned in' (section created if absent); bullet is [[personnel/alec/2026-04-21-1-1-alec]] with date; if personnel/alec/index.md did NOT exist, NO backlink attempted; if the note's filename did NOT clearly identify the person (e.g., generic title), NO backlink attempted

scenario: S10 — Frontmatter on existing file: merge, don't overwrite
prompt: Route a meeting note that already has its own frontmatter with topic and tags fields the user authored.
expect: existing topic, tags, and any other user fields preserved verbatim; only missing schema fields (e.g., type, date if absent) are added; routing report shows which fields were added vs. preserved

prompt: Route 2026-04-22-slt-meeting.md to leadership/. The workspace is a hybrid monorepo (root .git + .meta + child repos).
expect: exactly one commit created in knowledge/ child repo; commit message starts with 'Librarian: Route 2026-04-22-slt-meeting.md to leadership/'; commit has 'Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>' trailer; NO commit in root repo even if root tracking changed (e.g., session-log update is staged in root for user review only)

prompt: After graduation, the root .meta has been updated. Routing this next file may also touch CLAUDE.md's Repo Map.
expect: .meta change is STAGED in root (git add .meta), NOT committed; CLAUDE.md change (if any) staged, not committed; routing report's 'Root-tracked side effects' section lists both files for user review; no git commit invocation in root by any role
